hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.loop/.*(session|task-state|api-contracts)\.json$'; then SCHEMA=$(basename "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" .json); [ "$SCHEMA" = "task-state" ] && SCHEMA=task-state; node scripts/lib/forge-state.mjs validate "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" --schema "$SCHEMA" 1>&2; fi

CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit push\b|\bvercel .*--prod\b|\brailway up .*production\b|\bnpm publish\b|\brm -rf\b|--no-verify'; then node scripts/lib/forge-mode.mjs gate --tool Bash --command "$CMD" 1>&2 || exit 2; fi
